Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below to help reviewers
understand your change. Keep it short — one paragraph per section is usually enough.
-->

## What this PR does

<!-- One sentence: what changes, and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (hook, skill, agent, or rule behaves wrong)
- [ ] New skill, agent, or rule (generic and reusable, not project-specific)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## How this was tested

<!--
For workflow changes: did you run through at least one sprint cycle on a test
project? Which phases? What did you verify?
For doc changes: did you read the final rendered markdown?
-->

## Scope check

- [ ] This change is generic and useful to most users (not specific to my project)
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and my change fits the scope
- [ ] I've updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `## [Unreleased]` if this is a user-visible change
- [ ] I've updated the relevant documentation (`docs/WORKFLOW.md` or the affected skill/agent file)

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123, related to #456, etc. Leave blank if none. -->
